title: senecio mohavensis subsp. breviflorus
intro: Senecio mohavensis subsp. breviflorus, also known as the Mojave ragwort, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio mohavensis subsp. breviflorus include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
